outdoor mounting / structural support / corrosion resistance

IndustriesTelecommunications
Part Functionoutdoor mounting / structural support / corrosion resistance
Manufacturing Capabilitiessheet metal processing or CNC machining, surface treatment, threaded features and batch inspection

Project Scenario

The telecommunications bracket focused on outdoor installation where mounting stability and surface durability were both important.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivered brackets supported field installation review and helped confirm the chosen surface treatment approach.
